notes_zh:
### ✨ 新增

- **新增** 系统升级或应用移动位置后，重新授权辅助功能时会弹出引导浮窗，直接拖拽应用到系统设置即可（组件来自独立开源库 [lifedever/PermissionFlow](https://github.com/lifedever/PermissionFlow)）
- **新增** 快捷面板宽度变小时自动隐藏右侧预览区，给列表让出空间（#27，感谢 @amiaoapp 反馈）
- **新增** 侧边栏「类型 / 分组 / 来源」右键菜单新增"清空"，可清空当前范围内的条目，带进度条
- **新增** 删除条目改为"立即删除 + 撤销 toast"，8 秒内点撤销或按 `⌘Z` 恢复；深浅色自适应
- **新增** "粘贴并销毁"：在快捷面板按 `⌘⇧↩` 或 `⌘K → B`，粘贴后自动删除历史条目，5 秒内可按 `⌘Z` 撤销。适合一次性密码、临时 token 等敏感内容（置顶、收藏、受保护分组的条目不会生效）

### 🪄 优化

- **优化** 主窗口与快捷面板共用新的虚拟化列表，大量条目滚动更流畅、两处显示一致（#30，感谢 @miniers）
- **优化** 在快捷面板内按"打开管理器"快捷键时作用域限制在面板，不再触发全局（#26，感谢 @miniers）

### 🛠 修复

- **修复** 多条接力粘贴到 Word 时粘错了条目（#28，感谢 @mesafier 反馈）
- **修复** 来自 Telegram 等应用的自定义表情粘贴后格式丢失（#29，感谢 @xream 反馈）
- **修复** 快捷面板搜索框中文输入时光标位置异常（#27）
- **修复** 数据导入后侧边栏分组的条目数量显示不对（#31，感谢 @deafire 反馈）
- **修复** 快捷面板条目行高与主窗口不一致
- **修复** 接力未启动时加入队列，启动后出现"当前条目"重复
- **修复** 辅助功能授权浮窗在浅色模式下看不清（拖拽卡片用了写死的白色）
- **修复** 接力队列行内状态点、App 图标、文字没有垂直居中
notes_en:
### ✨ New

- **New** Re-authorization guide for Accessibility permission — after a system update or when the app moves on disk, a floating panel appears beside System Settings with a draggable app icon (built on our independent open-source helper [lifedever/PermissionFlow](https://github.com/lifedever/PermissionFlow))
- **New** Quick Panel auto-hides the preview pane when narrow, giving the list more room (#27, thanks @amiaoapp)
- **New** Sidebar "Type / Group / Source" right-click menu adds "Clear" to empty every item in the current scope, with progress feedback
- **New** Item deletion now uses an inline undo toast — delete instantly, press `⌘Z` or click **Undo** within 8 seconds to restore; adaptive to light/dark
- **New** "Paste & Destroy": press `⌘⇧↩` in the Quick Panel or invoke `⌘K → B` to paste the current clip and remove it from history in one shot. Press `⌘Z` within 5 seconds to restore. Intended for one-time values like OTP codes and throwaway tokens (pinned, favourited and protected-group items are excluded)

### 🪄 Improvements

- **Improve** Main window and Quick Panel now share a single native virtualized list — smoother scrolling with large collections, consistent look between the two (#30, thanks @miniers)
- **Improve** The "Open Manager" shortcut pressed inside the Quick Panel is scoped to the panel, no longer triggering global behavior (#26, thanks @miniers)

### 🛠 Fixes

- **Fix** Multi-item relay pasting to Word landed the wrong clip (#28, thanks @mesafier)
- **Fix** Custom emoji from Telegram and similar apps lost their rich format on paste (#29, thanks @xream)
- **Fix** IME cursor position in the Quick Panel search field (#27)
- **Fix** After data import, sidebar groups showed incorrect item counts (#31, thanks @deafire)
- **Fix** Quick Panel row height now matches the main window
- **Fix** Adding items to the relay queue before activation no longer creates a duplicate "current" clip after starting
- **Fix** Accessibility-permission panel was invisible in light mode (drag card had a hard-coded white background)
- **Fix** Relay row — status dot, app icon and text now vertically aligned on the same baseline
